title: These Mushrooms Can MIND CONTROL Ants!
summary: This short clip discusses how cordyceps fungi can parasitize and mind-control ants, using this as a jumping-off point to explore questions about intentionality, consciousness, and agency in fungal organisms.

key_claims.claim: Cordyceps fungus spores can infiltrate bullet ants' bodies and minds, controlling their movements to move to higher ground where fruiting bodies sprout from their heads
Cordyceps can wipe out entire ant colonies
Slime mold can figure out a more efficient route than the actual Japanese subway system when food is placed in the shape of the subway layout
